# Prove — Commitment Quotient

> Prove gives founders and CEOs behavioral proof of who will actually deliver — before they promote, hire, or hand over the keys. It measures three behaviors that predict follow-through — Initiative, Applied Grit, and Learnability — and combines them into the Commitment Quotient (CQ). A Be Legendary company.

Prove measures observed behavior in a work context, not personality. It is decision-support for leaders, never an automated hire/fire tool, and a low CQ is information, not a judgment of a person's worth.

## Product
- [How Prove works](https://provecq.com/how-it-works): Snapshot (15 min) → Validation (6 weeks, 40+ datapoints) → Decision.
- [The CQ Heatmap](https://provecq.com/heatmap): interactive demo scoring a team on Initiative, Applied Grit, and Learnability.
- [Better Every Day](https://provecq.com/better-every-day): subscription that keeps proven, high-CQ players growing.
- [For EOS](https://provecq.com/for-eos): make the GWC "Capacity" box real with behavioral data.
- [Work with us / pricing](https://provecq.com/work-with-us): Prove Sprint and Better Every Day.

## Free tools
- [Certainty Diagnostic](https://provecq.com/free-tools/certainty-diagnostic): 10 questions → your Certainty Score.
- [The 4 AM Test](https://provecq.com/free-tools/4am-test): grade one person's last 90 days.
- [Hidden Gem Identifier](https://provecq.com/free-tools/hidden-gem-identifier): find the people you overlook.
- [Get to Green](https://provecq.com/free-tools/get-to-green): a 146-point people-systems readiness map.
- [Cost of a Bad Bet](https://provecq.com/free-tools/cost-of-a-bad-bet): estimate the cost of one wrong hire or promotion.
